item.title: EDIT: I rescued this kitten. He’s a foster. He was the last one of the litter left. I’m well aware kittens do better in pairs. It’s why i have 6 of my own. I’m actively working on trying to find him a companion | safe to say he enjoyed
item.description: By @malpluscats: EDIT: I rescued this kitten. He’s a foster. He was the last one of the litter left. I’m well aware kittens do better in pairs. It’s why i have 6 of my own. I’m actively working on trying to find him a companion | safe to say he enjoyed

item.title: Cats seem completely fine… but something isn’t right 🐱👀 At first it looks normal… then you notice one small thing… and it all goes downhill fast 😭 I should’ve seen it coming 💀 Follow for your daily dose of cat chaos 🐾 Link in bio ⤵️#funnycatsoftiktok #cat
item.description: By @purrplay_official: Cats seem completely fine… but something isn’t right 🐱👀 At first it looks normal… then you notice one small thing… and it all goes downhill fast 😭 I should’ve seen it coming 💀 Follow for your daily dose of cat chaos 🐾 Link in bio ⤵️#funnycatsoftiktok #cat

item.title: My kind of therapy 🥹🐈🐈‍⬛ if you’re in NY, you can come decompress with certified therapy cats plus meet adoptable cats from @MeowSquad NYC🐈‍⬛ 🪤💚 ! The adoptable kitties are the absolute sweetest and super affectionate 😭🫶🏻 When: May 6-7, from 10:00 AM-4:0
item.description: By @nothangtw: My kind of therapy 🥹🐈🐈‍⬛ if you’re in NY, you can come decompress with certified therapy cats plus meet adoptable cats from @MeowSquad NYC🐈‍⬛ 🪤💚 ! The adoptable kitties are the absolute sweetest and super affectionate 😭🫶🏻 When: May 6-7, from 10:00 AM-4:0

item.title: Happy birthday Baby Tobey ♥️🥳 This is a few days after but it’s so bittersweet that he’s a adult now :( #catbirthday #adultcat #cat #kitten #fypシ

item.title: 🥺 Grieving a Cat Who Is Still Very Much Alive! . 💛 I hope 5 years from now I watch this & laugh cuz she’s still laying on my chest at 24 years old! . 🩷 Sweet pea & I are so intertwined, tangled up, & twisted, I don’t know how I’ll exist without her heart
item.description: By @wildatheartcats: 🥺 Grieving a Cat Who Is Still Very Much Alive! . 💛 I hope 5 years from now I watch this & laugh cuz she’s still laying on my chest at 24 years old! . 🩷 Sweet pea & I are so intertwined, tangled up, & twisted, I don’t know how I’ll exist without her heart

item.title: Your cat is basically a living sundial. ☀️🐱 They will follow every patch of sunlight in your house all day long, and there's a real reason for it. Cats aren't great at regulating their own body temperature, so that warm sunny spot isn't just cozy. It's ne
item.description: By @jacksongalaxy: Your cat is basically a living sundial. ☀️🐱 They will follow every patch of sunlight in your house all day long, and there's a real reason for it. Cats aren't great at regulating their own body temperature, so that warm sunny spot isn't just cozy. It's ne
